latest_news.headline: IRGC: Hormuz 'will not reopen until destroyed power plants rebuilt'
latest_news.text: IRGC statement: 'The strait of Hormuz will be completely closed and will not be opened until our destroyed power plants are rebuilt.' Essentially permanent blockade until reconstruction (years).

latest_news.headline: Israel launches extensive new wave of strikes on Tehran
latest_news.text: IDF announces wave of 'extensive strikes' on Tehran targeting regime infrastructure. Fresh escalation in capital.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

latest_news.headline: IDF approves expansion of ground+air attacks - 2nd division deployed
latest_news.text: IDF approves expansion of ground and air attacks against Hezbollah. Second division deployed to southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Lebanese PM: IRGC officers commanding Hezbollah operations
latest_news.text: Lebanese PM Salam says IRGC members are commanding Hezbollah operations in ongoing war against Israel.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge - key Litani River crossing
latest_news.text: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge, key Litani River crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: CNN confirms: Russian forces begin spring-summer 2026 offensive
latest_news.text: CNN: Russia begins anticipated spring-summer offensive against Ukrainian Fortress Belt. Syrskyi: 'stepped up pressure across several sections of the front.' Sloviansk/Kramatorsk directions.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 44% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 24 Hour 09 UTC. CRITICAL (up) ⬆️ ELEVATED→CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire expires midnight Mar 24 (15hrs). Pakistan FM vows 'eradicate terrorism' — no extension. Multiple ceasefire breaches. Kabul hospital 400+ killed. Post-Eid full war near-certain tomorrow. Updated 2026-03-23T09:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan FM vows to 'eradicate terrorism' as Afghan ceasefire nears end
latest_news.text: Pakistan FM says committed to 'eradicate the menace of terrorism' as Eid ceasefire expires midnight March 24. No extension signal. Post-ceasefire escalation near-certain.

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of mortar fire during Eid ceasefire - 1 killed. ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Fraying badly.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: No meaningful de-escalation signals. Iran doubled down on counter-threats. Russia launched new offensive. Pakistan ceasefire dead.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens to mine ALL Persian Gulf communication lines if coast/islands attacked
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Iran National Defence Council
latest_news.text: Iran's National Defence Council says any attempt to attack the Iranian coast or islands will cause 'all communication lines in the Persian Gulf to be mined' — a significant escalation from Hormuz-only blockade to Gulf-wide mine threat.

latest_news.headline: IRGC escalates: will hit Israeli AND Gulf power plants if US strikes Iran's
latest_news.text: IRGC statement: will attack Israel's power plants and those supplying US bases in Gulf if Trump carries out threat to 'obliterate' Iran's power network. Major counter-escalation.

latest_news.headline: Iran military declares ready to close Strait of Hormuz 'indefinitely'
latest_news.text: Iran's military says ready to close Hormuz indefinitely if Trump bombs power plants. Upgrading from 'threatened' to 'ready and prepared.'

latest_news.headline: IEA chief: war energy crunch worse than 1973+1979 oil crises and Ukraine gas crisis COMBINED
latest_news.text: Fatih Birol: 'Two oil crises and one gas crash put all together.' IEA consulting Asia/Europe on additional stockpile releases.

latest_news.headline: UK Starmer chairs emergency Cobra on war economic fallout
latest_news.text: Starmer, Chancellor Reeves, BoE Governor Bailey attend. UK bonds steeper decline than peers. Heavy UK dependence on imported natural gas.

latest_news.headline: Asia markets crash continues - Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3%
latest_news.text: Wave of selling across Asia-Pacific. US dollar rising as safe haven. Brent $112+. Won weakest since 2009.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 24, 10:04 UTC). TRUMP ULTIMATUM expired last night (~23:44 GMT). Iran escalates to Gulf-WIDE mining threat (not just Hormuz). IRGC permanent blockade declaration stands. Israel extensive Tehran strikes continue. No visible US military response to ultimatum expiry yet. Russia spring offensive confirmed. Pakistan ceasefire expired midnight. Brent $112+. IEA: worst energy crisis since 1970s.
de_escalation_watch: DE-ESCALATION: None. Iran escalated to Gulf-wide mining threat. Ultimatum expired with no off-ramp. IRGC permanent blockade language. Russia offensive ongoing. Pakistan ceasefire dead. Net trajectory: toward full Gulf mining + potential US power plant strikes.
